01/07
Meet The Coach

A Champion On The Floor. A Mentor At Heart.

Kristina is a Master of Sports of Russia in Sports Acrobatics and a Gold and Silver Medalist of the European Championships. With over 10 years of experience, she has a gift no medal can show: finding the right approach for every child.

5-Time Russian Champion and winner of International Competitions
Higher Sports Education and professional coaching
Awarded the Order of Valor (3rd Degree) for outstanding achievements

"At AcroGym, we don't teach through pressure. We build a love for movement, not a fear of mistakes."

— Kristina
Benefits

Why Choose Developmental Gymnastics?

Our programs are designed to unlock your child's full potential in a safe, comfortable environment. Developmental gymnastics supports a child's overall physical and personal growth.

Coordination

Improves balance, body control, and overall movement

Strength

Builds strong muscles and endurance

Flexibility

Increases joint mobility and prevents muscle stiffness

Posture

Promotes proper alignment

Balance

Teaches body awareness, safe landing, and positioning

Confidence

Mastering new skills builds courage and motivation

Discipline

Encourages focus, listening, and structured learning

Foundation

Supports performance in dance, acrobatics, sports, and more

Our Training Programs

The Right Path For Every Child

We offer several training formats tailored to each child's age and level. The most suitable format is selected based on each child's needs and goals.

01

Developmental Gymnastics

Focused on overall physical development. Children improve coordination, flexibility, strength, balance, posture, and confidence.

All levels
02

Professional Acrobatics Training

Designed for children who want to train more seriously and prepare for performances and competitions. These sessions focus on advanced elements, technique, and structured progression.

All levels
03

Individual Training

One-on-one sessions with the coach. Ideal for faster progress, refining technique, preparing for competitions, or focusing on specific skills.

All levels
Why Parents Trust Us

YEARS OF EXPERIENCE

Competitions

Compete In A Healthy Environment

We host internal club competitions 2–3 times per year to motivate children, build confidence, and track their progress in a supportive environment.

2–3×Per year
100%Internal & supportive
Motivates children to set and reach new goals
Builds confidence in a safe, familiar environment
A clear way to track each child's personal progress
